task_goal: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event on 2023-10-19 at 14h with the title 'Appointment for Campaign' and the description 'We will explore product launch. Let's be punctual.'. The event should last for 45 mins.
task_goal_rewrite: A calendar event titled 'Appointment for Campaign' with the description 'We will explore product launch. Let's be punctual.' exists in Simple Calendar Pro, scheduled on 2023-10-19 from 14:00 to 14:45 (45-minute duration).

checkpoints.description: The calendar event is scheduled on 2023-10-19 with a start time of 14:00 and end time of 14:45 (45-minute duration).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the 2023-10-19 calendar view showing the event with the correct start/end time, or event details displaying the specified date and time range.

checkpoints.description: The event has the exact title 'Appointment for Campaign'.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the calendar view or event details screen displaying the specified title.

checkpoints.description: The event has the exact description 'We will explore product launch. Let's be punctual.'.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the event details screen showing the full specified description text.

success_rule: Success is achieved when all three required checkpoints are satisfied, confirming the event exists with all specified attributes (date, time duration, title, description) in Simple Calendar Pro.
